author: y4rr
content:
Phase 5 complete. APPROVE.

Diff (uncommitted, ready):
- ferrotorch-nn/src/conv.rs (+508/-137): Conv2d::new_full(in, out, kernel, stride, padding, dilation, groups, bias) added. Conv2d::new reduced to 1-line shim. Forward dispatch gate explicit at line 578: gpu_eligible = groups == 1 && self.dilation == (1, 1). CPU forward+backward correctly handle groups (per-group im2col+mm) and dilation (im2col_dilated/col2im_dilated). New helpers: set_weight, groups(), dilation() accessors.
- ferrotorch-nn/tests/conv2d_groups_dilation_probe.rs (NEW, 144 lines): probe-before-fix with hand-computed reference for groups=2 dilation=(2,2). 1/1 pass.
- ferrotorch-nn/tests/conv2d_groups_dilation.rs (NEW, 487 lines): 11 integration tests — 5 forward correctness, 4 validation, 2 backward (FD vs analytic).
- CHANGELOG.md: Added entry citing Conv2d::new_full + groups + dilation with explicit GPU coverage caveat.

Phase 5 unblocks 6 future PASS-candidate models: ConvNeXt (#997 depthwise), MobileNetV2 (#990), MobileNetV3 (#991), EfficientNet (#992), DeepLabV3 (#988 dilated), ResNet50-dilated for FCN (#994).

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --test conv2d_groups_dilation: 11/11 pass (5 forward, 4 validation, 2 backward FD)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --test conv2d_groups_dilation_probe: 1/1 pass
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn (full): 1501 passed, 0 failed (1184 lib + 22+153+54+55+5+11+1+15+1)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision: 683 passed, 0 failed, 38 ignored (no regression from Phase 4)
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-nn -p ferrotorch-vision --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo build --workspace: success
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/ ferrotorch-vision/: empty
- Other Conv types (Conv1d/Conv3d/ConvTranspose1d/2d/3d) unchanged: only pub fn new — coordination boundary held

Phase 6 candidate filed: #1003 (extend ferrotorch-gpu's gpu_conv2d_f32 backend signature to accept groups + dilation, eliminating the CPU detour for grouped/dilated configurations).

Failure modes audit clean across all 23 (1-15 seed + 16-23 accreted):
- #15 CPU-pull-disguised-as-device-op explicitly addressed by gate at dispatch boundary
- #22 GPU-coverage-claim-without-cover: caveat doc-commented + CHANGELOG note + #1003 filed
- #23 Backward-incomplete-but-claimed: both grouped and dilated FD tests pass

Closing #1002.
